allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(ux\): mobile touch targets, emoji rendering, temp status labels *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(food\): radical UX simplification — lighter, faster, ADHD-friendly *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(pwa\): enable PWA with service worker and correct manifest icons *)
Bash(git commit -m 'chore: delete legacy, unused, and backup files *)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); print\('expo-router:', deps.get\('expo-router','missing'\)\); print\('expo:', deps.get\('expo','missing'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); web=d['expo'].get\('web',{}\); print\('bundler:', web.get\('bundler'\)\); print\('baseUrl:', d['expo'].get\('experiments',{}\).get\('baseUrl'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "try { require\('expo-router/html'\); console.log\('expo-router/html: OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('expo-router/html: MISSING -', e.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\); }")
